eval_results.name: segmented-qa-flow
eval_results.key_finding: Segmented Q&A flow correctly structured with one question per round, clear section separators used

eval_results.name: requirements-clarification
eval_results.key_finding: Vague 'optimize performance' requirement decomposed into specific metrics (response time <200ms, 99th percentile)

eval_results.name: decision-matrix-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Decision matrix generated for PostgreSQL/MongoDB/Redis across 5 criteria, PostgreSQL recommended with reasoning

eval_results.name: context-accumulation
eval_results.key_finding: Round 4 correctly referenced all 3 previous decisions (PostgreSQL, RESTful, React) and built coherent new content

eval_results.name: summary-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Summary included 4 confirmed decisions, 5 action items, 2 flagged open questions with TBD status

segmented_qa.description: One question per round, waiting for answers

strengths: Effective decomposition of vague requirements into measurable criteria
Comprehensive decision matrix generation with recommendation
Strong context accumulation across multiple discussion rounds
Actionable summary with clear decision log and next steps
recommendations: Test with adversarial/contradictory requirements in iteration 2
Add edge cases for very long discussions (10+ rounds)
Test decision matrix with >5 options and >8 criteria
